global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with prominent text and shapes to attract attention.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book a trip with a discount.

elements.label: Blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the ad.

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: A small logo positioned at the top left, featuring the text 'HorizonHop' in a simple font.

elements.label: Main text
elements.description: Bold white text in the center reads 'Book your next trip', conveying the main message clearly.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A prominent badge displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color, emphasizing the discount offered.

elements.label: Special fares text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message reads 'Special fares today', providing additional information.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape in the background, possibly an oval or rectangle, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape, similar to the first, positioned centrally to enhance the design.

elements.label: Small decorative element
elements.description: A smaller decorative shape that complements the overall design, adding depth.

elements.label: Minor shape
elements.description: A small abstract shape located towards the bottom, contributing to the overall composition.

elements.label: Another minor shape
elements.description: A similar small shape to ID 9, positioned closely to it, maintaining visual balance.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bold button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', inviting immediate action from viewers.
elements.text_content: Book your next trip 30% Book now

elements.label: HorizonHop logo
elements.description: The logo appears again, reinforcing brand identity in the top section of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, bright and modern, key elements include discount and call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main text is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Book your next trip, 30%, Book now, HorizonHop
